    // reverse the digits to get the correct order
    digits = digits.reverse();
    return digits.join('');
}

        num = Math.floor(num / 36);
    }
    // reverse the digits to get the correct order
    digits = digits.reverse();
    return digits.join('');
}

function solve(n: number): string {
    function convertToBase36(num: number): string {
        if (num === 0) return '0';
        let digits: string[] = [];
        while (num > 0) {
            let remainder = num % 36;
            let char: string;
            if (remainder < 10) {
                char = remainder.toString();
            } else {
                char = String.fromCharCode(65 + remainder - 10);
            }
            digits.push(char);
            num = Math.floor(num / 36);
        }
        digits = digits.reverse();
        return digits.join('');
    }

    const n2 = n * n;
    const n3 = n * n * n;
    const hex = n2.toString(16).toUpperCase();
    const base36 = convertToBase36(n3);
    return hex + base36;
}
